scene_title: Olhos de profeta medieval com lagrimas de ouro
narrative_beat: Iris carmesim e dourada com chamas internas

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid medieval prophet close-up eyes with crimson and gold irises and internal flame pupils with golden tears running down face in expression of lamentation in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the golden tears running down the prophet's face from crimson-gold eyes
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated busy street with people looking at phones in grey hypnotized by screens in background
props: prophet eyes with crimson gold irises

environment.location: sacred perspective watching modern mass deception

composition.foreground: eyes and tears in vivid crimson gold

style.post_processing: heavy halation on tears, deep black crush

mood.emotion: the prophet weeping for a generation that cannot see

symbolism.primary: eyes of fire seeing what billions of blind eyes miss
symbolism.secondary: golden tears as the most expensive currency — prophetic grief

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
